title: Aejeunghwaeum
titleNative: 애증화음
synopsis: A pair of girl prodigies rival each other from middle school to their senior year in high school. The delicate balance is broken when one catches up to the other in piano skill. The rivalry then turns into obsession.

tags.name: Yuri

title: Kiite Kuremasu yo ne? Senpai
titleNative: 聞いてくれますよね？先輩
synopsis: One day, the most beautiful girl in school suddenly shows up at Kento Ikuno's door. She shows him a "ticket" written in awkward handwriting. This is the start of a romantic comedy about a "ticket to do anything I say" that came from his childhood. (Source: Tonari no Young Jump, translated)

title: Bing Jiao Meimei Zhi Xiang Rang Wo Qifu Ta
titleRomaji: Bing Jiao Meimei Zhi Xiang Rang Wo Qifu Ta
titleNative: 病娇妹妹只想让我欺负她
synonyms: Mi hermanita solo quiere que la intimide
The Yandere Sister Just Wants Me to Bully Her
synopsis: Gu Xing, a novelist, deeply detests manipulative women who play coy, so she intentionally created such a main character for her webnovel, so she can abuse the fictional character in all sorts of ways! However, she never imagined that she would end up transported into her own story, and now she gets to take it out on her personally! But due to her own fetish for pretty girls, she couldn't bring herself to harm the beautiful protagonist she created, and she eventually ends up becoming her protector instead… As she was worrying about her own mixed feelings, the supposedly helpless protagonist pushes the male lead away and insistently confesses her love for Gu Xing instead! What! So I was the one being protected all along! (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Kagaku Chop
titleNative: カガクチョップ
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: Vampire Princess X Knight
titleNative: 血姬与骑士
synonyms: The Blood Princess and the Knight
synopsis: As a holy knight, I was captured after losing in a battle against vampires. "Huhu~ Kill you? Keep dreaming and receive my Embrace. In the future, please give me lots of guidance, my beloved daughter~" The silvery-haired loli vampire queen gently lifted my chin and smirked in amusement, her sharp fangs aiming for my neck. (Source: Bilibili Comics)

title: Saiyuki
titleNative: 最遊記
synopsis: Genjo is a Buddhist priest in the city of Shangri-La, which is being ravaged by yokai spirits that have fallen out of balance with the natural order. His superiors send him on a journey far to the west to discover why this is happening and how to stop it. His companions are three yokai with human souls. But this is no day trip—the four will encounter many discoveries and horrors on the way, and on the road, Genjo will wonder … can he really trust his supernatural companions? (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: How to Handle My Sassy Big Sis
titleRomaji: Namaiki na Gal Ane wo Wakaraseru Hanashi
titleEnglish: How to Handle My Sassy Big Sis
titleNative: 生意気なギャル姉を解らせる話
synonyms: The Story of Making My Cheeky Gal Sister Understand
synopsis: She’s a big sister with an attitude, and every time she opens her mouth, it’s all just insults and negativity! However, her little brother has had enough, and he’s got a plan to turn her into the cute, honest sister he knows she can be! To make it work, he’ll first have to take her down a peg or two… (Source: Yen Press)

title: Atashi Merry-san. Ima Isekai ni Iruno…….
titleRomaji: Atashi Merry-san. Ima Isekai ni Iruno…….
titleNative: あたしメリーさん。いま異世界にいるの……。
synonyms: It's Mary-san. I'm in another world now...
synopsis: Naibara Hirokazu left his parent's home in Miyagi to attend university in Tokyo and began living alone in an apartment in Saitama. Soon after moving, he answers a phone call from an unknown number that rings repeatedly, and hears a girl's voice saying "I'm Mary, I'm at the garbage dump right now... I'm the doll you threw away..." Thinking it's a prank call, he hangs up, but the call comes again and again... It seems like the girl is calling little by little, moving towards him!? The next day, he answers the phone, not knowing how many times it has already been called, and hears "I'm Mary, I'm in front of your room right now..." No sooner does he hear a strange voice praying from outside the apartment...? A phone call from Saitama to give advice to Mary, the urban legend who has been transported to another world!? A little girl connected by smartphone to a university student's story of defeating the demon king!! (Source: Gamma Plus, translated)

title: Akanabe-sensei wa Tereshirazu
titleNative: 茜部先生は照れ知らず
synopsis: Koki Sakieda is an assistant for Akira Akanebe, a manga artist he admires, who always tries to praise him in some way. Sakieda is worried that he will end up falling in love with her if this situation continues. Then Akanebe unexpectedly asks him to go out with her....... The story depicts the daily life of Akanebe-sensei, who lavishes praise on Sakieda without embarrassment, and Sakieda, who tries to accept it all gracefully. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleRomaji: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleNative: この犬ときたら孫のことしか考えていない～犬生魔王のやり遺し～
synopsis: The "Demonic Invasion" lasted for hundreds of years, and countless heroes were cut down by the Demon Lord during their reign…! Until the hero Terios, known as The Last Hope, finally defeated the Demon Lord and brought peace to the land. But the hero Terios vanished, and the Demon Lord, thought to be dead, is miraculously reborn… as a dog!? This is the story of the last Demon Lord, now all soft and fluffy, desperately trying to live a peaceful life while protecting his granddaughter, now a fugitive targeted by all of creation. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Ring ni Kakero
titleNative: リングにかけろ
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)
synonyms: Put it all in the Ring

title: You Shou Yan
titleNative: 有兽焉
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleRomaji: Boroboro no Elf-san wo Shiawase ni Suru Kusuriuri-san
titleEnglish: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleNative: ボロボロのエルフさんを幸せにする薬売りさん
synopsis: An apothecary lives a quiet life selling potions and medicine in a country village, until one day he’s approached with a devil’s bargain. A pawnbroker offers him the perfect ingredient for crafting legendary medicine—but the “ingredient” turns out to be a mortally wounded elf! Legend has it the flesh and bones of elves can be ground up into a true panacea, and this elven maiden is on the brink of death after being ruthlessly tortured by slavers. Filled with rage, the apothecary vows to nurse her back to health and happiness, no matter what it takes. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Jigoku de Mesu ga Hikaru
titleNative: 地獄でメスがひかる
synopsis: Hiromi is mistreated by her family because of her naturally ugly appearance. Unable to bear her situation, she attempts to commit suicide, but is rescued in the nick of time by a genius doctor, Iwao Toshiaki, and is exposed to human kindness for the first time. However, Iwao is trying to use Hiromi's brain to enter the realm of the divine, which is inaccessible to humans... (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: 雨夜の月
synopsis: One day, while rushing to a piano lesson, a girl named Saki collides with someone on the street. As Saki collects herself, the stranger picks up the sheet music Saki dropped, hands it to Saki together with a band-aid, and continues on her way—all without sayin
searchTerms: The Moon on a Rainy Night

title: Urushi Uruhashi
titleNative: うるしうるはし
synopsis: Mihiro Kanayama is a third-year high school student who aspires to become a lacquerware craftsman. He is given a challenge by his grandfather, who tells him to "create a piece while thinking about the person who would use it." He didn't know how to go about it, until he meets Tsumugi Fukaya, a woman working at an inn. Pure emotions bloom within a young man dedicated to traditional craftsmanship. Though he may be clumsy in his first attempts, you will come to admire his determined perseverance! (Source: Manga Cross, translated)

title: Player
titleNative: 플레이어
synopsis: Through posting a "Best Comment", I somehow became the main character of a webtoon! (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleRomaji: Shiou no Kikan: Moto Yuusha no Ore, Jibun ga Soshiki Shita Chuuni Himitsu Kessha o Tomeru tame ni Futatabi Isekai ni Shoukan Sareteshimau
titleNative: 屍王の帰還　～元勇者の俺、自分が組織した厨二秘密結社を止めるために再び異世界に召喚されてしまう～
synonyms: The Return of the Corpse King
synopsis: "How can my past self get so excited doing all those embarrassing things!?" When he was in the third year of middle school, Hizaki Shiou was summoned to another world to save it. After defeating the Demon King, he was forcibly returned back to the present day. Yet another three years later, he is summoned to the other world once again, this time to stop the rampage of the secret society "Helheim." That organization was supposedly actually the one that he had founded during his chuunibyou phase, where he called himself the "Corpse King"—a dark past too embarrassing to remember! Someone seems to be impersonating the name of "Helheim" and tarnishing its reputation. To uncover the truth behind this mystery and clear the organization's name, the Corpse King reunites with his former subordinates, the "Hakkai," who once made Helheim the strongest it had ever been. While agonizing over his dark past, he begins to take action in the other world once again. Their first stop is the Steel City of Gagiul—rescue the city struggling through famine as well as the pale-looking count's daughter in distress. "Helheim, moving out. (Source: Comic-Walker, translated)

title: Aruiwa, Watashi no Meitantei
titleNative: 或いは、私の名探偵
synopsis: High schooler Odagiri Momo leaves her home island to attend high school on the mainland. Having grown up on a boring island, Momo dreams of becoming a detective and is always on the lookout for cases. After moving into her first apartment, she meets the mysterious beauty Akaishi Kotone and falls for her at first sight. Declaring she'll make the reluctant Kotone her “assistant” against her will, the two form a buddy team to solve small everyday mysteries together. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)
